description_long: This is a hardcover book with a predominantly red and black cover, featuring a technical illustration of a wireframe architectural structure in white. The book appears to be of medium thickness, with a sturdy, slightly glossy cover and visible white pages along the edges. The front cover is dominated by a bold, blocky title in white, set against the red lower half, while the upper half contains the architectural illustration on a black background. The spine is red with white text, matching the front cover's color scheme, and the book's corners and edges show minimal wear. The book is likely intended for professional or academic use, given its technical subject matter and formal design. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and utilitarian, suitable for use in an urban or educational environment.
description: A hardcover book with a red and black cover, featuring a white wireframe architectural illustration and bold white title text. The book is medium-thick and has a sturdy, slightly glossy finish.
description_view_0: The front cover is visible, showing the architectural illustration and bold white title text on a red and black background.
description_view_1: The book is seen from the side, highlighting the thickness and the white page edges, with the cover's red and black color scheme partially visible.
description_view_2: The book is viewed from the bottom edge, emphasizing the white pages and the underside of the cover, with the title text partially readable in reverse.
description_view_3: The spine and part of the front cover are visible, showing the red spine with white text and the continuation of the architectural illustration.
attribute_cover_illustration: The main illustration on the front cover is a technical, white wireframe drawing of an architectural structure, resembling a building framework or scaffolding. The style is schematic and precise, evoking engineering or architectural blueprints. The illustration is set against a black background, giving it a modern, professional appearance.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is red with white, horizontally oriented text matching the front cover's title. The design is simple and utilitarian, with no decorative elements beyond the text.
attribute_publisher_logo: A small, circular logo is visible on the lower part of the spine, featuring a white symbol or mark on a red background.
